name: Argyle Payroll Connectivity API
what_it_does: Argyle payroll connectivity REST API for fintechs, lenders, and employers to access real-time employment and income data directly from payroll providers and gig economy platforms with user consent. Enables AI agents to manage payroll account connection and authentication for employment verification automation, handle income and earnings data retrieval for loan underwriting automation, access employment status and tenure verification for identity and employment confirmation automation, retrieve pay schedule and deposit routing information for direct deposit switching automation, manage gig economy platform earnings aggregation for gig worker income verification automation, handle earned wage access integration for employer EWA program automation, access paycheck and W-2 data for tax and lending decisioning automation, retrieve shift and hours data for workforce management integration automation, manage user consent and data access permissions for privacy-compliant employment data automation, and integrate Argyle with loan origination, banking, and HR platforms for end-to-end income and employment data connectivity.
use_cases: Verifying income from mortgage underwriting automation agents
Switching direct deposit from fintech onboarding automation agents
Enabling EWA from earned wage access automation agents
Aggregating gig income from platform worker loan agents
not_for: Business financial data (use Plaid or Codat for business accounts)
Identity verification beyond employment (use Jumio or Persona)
Credit bureau and FICO score access (use Experian or Equifax)
best_when: A fintech lender, neobank, or employer wanting AI agents to automate income verification, direct deposit switching, earned wage access delivery, and gig worker earnings aggregation using Argyle's real-time payroll connectivity platform with user-permissioned data access.
avoid_when: FCRA CONSUMER REPORT CLASSIFICATION FOR LENDING: Argyle employment and income data used for credit decisioning may constitute a consumer report under FCRA; automated lending decisions based on Argyle data must comply with FCRA adverse action notice requirements; automated loan denial without FCRA adverse action notice creates FCRA violation. CFPB OPEN BANKING RULEMAKING TRANSITION: CFPB Section 1033 open banking rule requires consumer access to financial data including payroll; Argyle's market position and data access model may be affected by 1033 rulemaking compliance requirements; evaluate Argyle's 1033 compliance roadmap before building long-term automated income verification workflows dependent on Argyle data access model. EARNED WAGE ACCESS STATE REGULATION: Automated EWA delivery via Argyle must comply with state EWA laws; multiple states (California, Nevada, Missouri, New Jersey) have enacted or are considering EWA-specific regulations; automated EWA programs without state-specific compliance review creates consumer protection exposure in regulated states.

auth.notes: Argyle uses API key and OAuth 2.0 authentication. REST API with JSON and mobile/web SDKs for Link UI. New York HQ. Founded 2018 by Shmulik Fishman. Private (~$77M raised, Sandbox Insurtech Ventures, SignalFire, Rockefeller Asset Management). Payroll connectivity to 250+ payroll providers, employers, and gig platforms. Link UI for user-permissioned payroll account connection. Income verification, direct deposit switching, EWA. Competes with Pinwheel and Atomic Financial for payroll connectivity.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-connection or volume subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-payroll account connection pricing; volume subscription for high-frequency verification; sandbox for development
pricing.notes: New York NY. Private (~$77M raised). Per-connection or volume pricing. Sandbox available. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payroll data retrieval throttled; webhooks for connection and data refresh events

known_agent_gotchas: PAYROLL DATA FRESHNESS DEPENDS ON PAYROLL PROVIDER SYNC: Argyle data freshness depends on when the connected payroll provider last ran payroll; automated income verification may return stale data for employees paid biweekly or monthly; automated lending decisioning should check last_synced timestamp and trigger data refresh if data is older than threshold for time-sensitive decisions

USER AUTHENTICATION REQUIRED FOR EACH PAYROLL PROVIDER: Argyle requires user to authenticate to each payroll provider through Argyle Link; automated EWA or direct deposit workflows that need data from multiple gig platforms require separate Link authentication flows for each platform; automated income aggregation for gig workers with multiple platform income requires orchestrating multiple Link sessions

PAYROLL PROVIDER COVERAGE GAPS FOR EMPLOYERS: Argyle covers 250+ payroll providers but not all employers; automated income verification for employees of small businesses on unknown payroll software creates connection failure; implement fallback income verification method (pay stub upload, document verification) for employers not covered by Argyle payroll connectivity

DIRECT DEPOSIT SWITCH TIMING FOR PAYROLL CUTOFF: Argyle direct deposit switching instructions must be submitted before payroll processing cutoff to take effect for next paycheck; automated direct deposit switching without payroll cutoff awareness creates switch that takes effect starting with the paycheck after next; implement payroll schedule awareness in automated direct deposit switching to set correct expectation

LINK SESSION USER EXPERIENCE FOR AUTOMATED WORKFLOWS: Argyle payroll connection requires user-facing Link UI authentication flow; automated workflows cannot fully automate Argyle payroll connection without user interaction; automated income verification is dependent on user completing Argyle Link authentication; design automated workflows to prompt user for Argyle Link completion before proceeding with automated income analysis
agent_readiness.security_notes: Payroll connectivity. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Employment data, income records, and payroll account connections.

security_score_components.security_notes: Payroll connectivity. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Employment, income, and payroll data.
